message:
Welcome to The Unknown Unknown, are you prepared for the challenge?

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked Start button
:alarm_clock: - You have 30 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Hey team, getting a few reports now, looks like confusion from the customers on what they ordered?
This is strange
Just seen a couple of reports of customers not receiving the right item on delivery
Hmm? that sounds strange. @jamie.buchanan can you take point and start sizing this up?
Bob can you tell me what percentage of customers are being impacted? And which countries?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Tinus I'm on it
Clicked undefined button
Clicked org button
Clicked undefined button
Checking reports...
One report said the user wanted to buy 'Sunglasses' but he got 'Tank-top' in confirmation
Just double checked with shipping looks like the items that has been ordered are correct and we're sending the right item
We have currently got more than 17 complaints so far
Shay Can you try to recreate the problem please? We are looking for wrong items
:star: Reproduces the incident
Bez FYI, just investigating some incorrect item delivery
Sure i can try now
Do we have a ticket created for this?
I was able to place an order

Working theory so far:
• Customers are seeing incorrect Item after they have chosen it
• But correct Item is being shipped
• Problem sounds narrowed to basket presentation?
:star: Form a working theory
but i noticed its not matching with the image
<https://i.ibb.co/219gV7DL/outage.png>
We do have recent changes
Shay what stage of the customer journey are you looking when you see the wrong item?
On the home page
Do you see the issue as well?
Maya Hi. can you do a security sweep to check if you see anything unusal?
What about the financial impact @Jamie.buchanan?
:bulb: Declare an incident.
Sure i can take a look now
No spikes in WAF blocks or suspicious auth patterns. Traffic looks normal from a security perspective.
There's nothing to highlight from SecOps, no alerts. All security agents are functioning correctly. We don't have any indication of a security issue here.
It's probably more of a data/application layer issue. But i'll keep monitoring in case anything changes.
Tinus I can see that none of the images matches their text description
Oh no, do we know the financial impact from this?
Tinus that happens on the catalogue page and the basket
Bob any update on customer numbers affected?
Gathering more information....
Bez sizing the problem now
Wait one customer noticed that the image is not matching up with the product name
This will actually have a major financial impact.
We'll likely see high return rates from customers, that's going to mean a lot of financial loss from shipping and refund costs.
Seems to be that users don't know whether the product they're purchasing matches the image or the description.
We could be shipping the wrong items
Please let Bez know right away
Can you explain customer impact, what's the user experience like?

The image is not matching up with the product name

This will actually have a major financial impact.
We'll likely see high return rates from customers, that's going to mean a lot of financial loss from shipping and refund costs.

Seems to be that users don't know whether the product they're purchasing matches the image or the description.
:star: Qualify the problem
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
We need to stop users from placing any more orders
Can we bring down the platform?
Bez Confirm you want us to block all users please?
I can confirm, lets bring down the platform
SEV1 due to product description mismatch we are going to block all access - hence SEV1
*Incident Number INC100078:* SEV1 due to product description mismatch we are going to block all access - hence SEV1
:star: Incident record created
:star: Take command
Oh no, please let me know what % of sales is affected by this quickly
Tinus Can you delegate actions to block all access to the platform on Bez's orders please?
Can do, Daniel can you bring down the platform please?
I will bring down the frontend down now
Daniel Can you investigate this mismatch in product image and text details?
Ok the website is now down
@jamie.buchanan How does it look now?
Daniel HTTP 503 - thanks
Daniel what deployments have occurred recently please?
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Shay can you provide the list?
Here's the detailed info on each of the changes made today
Hope this helps:<https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ULPUBLIC/pages/1186431049/The+Unknown+Unknown+-+Change+Request+Logs>
Bez we have successfully blocked all users - so 100% of sales are affected
Tanya Do you think the cart service deploy Change ID: CHG89418 would have created current issues?
:star: Reviewed changes
I can take a look now...
Nope all packages have been checked and would not have caused an outage like this
Tinus Can I suggest the hypothesis that this has something to do with cached data? How would you think about that given our architecture?
Bez we are triaging the problem
I suggest bringing in Hamed and getting his thoughts on this
Im going to take a look at the infra
Hamed Can I suggest the hypothesis that this has something to do with cached data? How would you think about that given our architecture?
So lets ground here, what do we know so far @jamie?
Checking now...
no memory or cpu spikes all looks good from Infra nothing to highlight
Although I don't have any data, I strongly believe this issue originates from the application rather than the platform.
Shay Can you link the Frontend deploy Change ID: CHG89415 to todays problem? It is the only one at the frontend where we see the problem?
No spikes or response time deviations, app owners must check configuration.
This is not an infra problem. If users are seeing mismatched products, someone could be messing with our system otherwise its an application/service-level bug
Tinus who is our external CDN provider?
But it's not a platform issue.

For CDN we use Fastly as our external content-delivery provider.
They handle static asset distribution (images, JS, CSS) at the edge.
At the moment, Fastly shows no errors, no purges, and no anomalies on our side.
what do we know so far @jamie?
:alarm_clock: - You have less than 5 minutes. You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.

Hamed
Observations:
• product at first stage of user journey (Frontend?) shows mismatch of image and product detail
• same mismatch is presnent at the cart stage
Working Hypothesis:
• some sort of cache problem?
• or identifier mismatch at database?
• or External cdn problelm?
Sure me and @Shay can take a look now.
CHG89415: Checked the mobile Add to Cart button is working perfectly for me
Can we flush Fastly CDN Hamed?
The issue could be anywhere, we should look at the configuration mapping between product images and names.
For CHG89418 the CartService 3.9.3 deployed successfully, no functional issues detected.
And lastly CHG89412: product names in Redis match UAT DB
@Daniel do you know which application holds this data?
@Tanya ? can you check if this is stored in a database or Redis cache?
@jamie.buchanan if there are no visible errors, this might be a configuration issue; the above details may help narrow it down.
The configuration is stored in the Product Catalogue Service. I pushed a change in UAT yesterday that updates the Redis cache with the latest product names.
@Hamed yes, this information is stored in Redis cache and the cache was refreshed earlier today.
Daniel roll back that UAT change please?
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Hamed Can we prepare to flush Fastly?
:alarm_clock: - You have less than 2 minutes. You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Bez we are looking at datastore identifier changes
Its a script so it cant be rolled back
Daniel explain more please?
but i can check the database and provide a Redis key dump
Sure let me gather the details

Rollback only affects code, container images, or deployments.

It does NOT affect: Redis key values

Thank you for playing, We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.
Once you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form, just hit I am ready when you want to start. I am ready button
Clicked Start_feedback button
Submission successful
